news.title: Piramal Finance to monitor July-August for industry asset quality trends.
news.summary: Piramal Finance to monitor July-August for industry asset quality trends.

news.title:
Piramal Finance's Jairam Sridharan expects NPAs to rise in Q2, driven by MSME issues.
Fuel price hikes from the Iran conflict are key factors; asset quality monitored till August.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance's Jairam Sridharan expects NPAs to rise in Q2, driven by MSME issues.
Fuel price hikes from the Iran conflict are key factors; asset quality monitored till August.

news.title:
Piramal Finance's AUM surpasses Rs 1 lakh crore, aiming for growth via microfinance acquisition.
Company targets Rs 1.5 lakh crore AUM by March 2028, says CEO Jairam Sridharan.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance's AUM surpasses Rs 1 lakh crore, aiming for growth via microfinance acquisition.
Company targets Rs 1.5 lakh crore AUM by March 2028, says CEO Jairam Sridharan.

news.title:
Piramal Finance completed the sale of its stake in Shriram Life Insurance for Rs. 600 crore.
The transaction with Sanlam Emerging Markets was finalized on 30th March 2026.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance completed the sale of its stake in Shriram Life Insurance for Rs. 600 crore.
The transaction with Sanlam Emerging Markets was finalized on 30th March 2026.

news.title:
Piramal Finance plans to raise ₹15,000 crore via non-convertible debentures.
Debentures will be issued from Apr 1, 2026, to Mar 31, 2027, in tranches.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance plans to raise ₹15,000 crore via non-convertible debentures.
Debentures will be issued from Apr 1, 2026, to Mar 31, 2027, in tranches.

news.title:
Piramal Finance approves amalgamation with its wholly owned subsidiaries.
The company greenlights redeemable non-convertible debentures; Director Gautam Doshi resigns.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance approves amalgamation with its wholly owned subsidiaries.
The company greenlights redeemable non-convertible debentures; Director Gautam Doshi resigns.

news.title:
Piramal Finance's board approves merger with 3 subsidiaries, pending regulatory nod.
Board approves private bond placement of up to Rs 15,000 cr; director resigns.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance's board approves merger with 3 subsidiaries, pending regulatory nod.
Board approves private bond placement of up to Rs 15,000 cr; director resigns.

news.title:
Piramal Finance faces AY 2024-25 tax scrutiny; FY 2023-24 tax loss of ₹10,110 crore allowed.
Cumulative assessed tax losses stand at ₹24,600 crore; disclosure made as a precaution.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance faces AY 2024-25 tax scrutiny; FY 2023-24 tax loss of ₹10,110 crore allowed.
Cumulative assessed tax losses stand at ₹24,600 crore; disclosure made as a precaution.

news.title:
Moody's upgraded Piramal Finance's outlook to positive, signaling better financial health.
The improved outlook reflects potential creditworthiness enhancements for the company.
news.summary:
Moody's upgraded Piramal Finance's outlook to positive, signaling better financial health.
The improved outlook reflects potential creditworthiness enhancements for the company.

news.title:
Piramal Finance Ltd confirms timely interest payments on its NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Interest payments of Rs. 365.15 lakh and Rs. 203.34 lakh were made on 20th March 2026.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance Ltd confirms timely interest payments on its NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Interest payments of Rs. 365.15 lakh and Rs. 203.34 lakh were made on 20th March 2026.

news.title:
Piramal Finance targets ₹1.5 lakh crore AUM by March 2028 with 23-26% CAGR.
Focus on profit growth, retail/wholesale expansion, and AI-driven productivity.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance targets ₹1.5 lakh crore AUM by March 2028 with 23-26% CAGR.
Focus on profit growth, retail/wholesale expansion, and AI-driven productivity.

news.title:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.
NBFCs were among the notable applicants to RBI for these fundraising proposals.
news.summary:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.
NBFCs were among the notable applicants to RBI for these fundraising proposals.

news.title:
Piramal Finance Ltd announces its participation in Jefferies' 2nd India NBFC Access Day on March 24, 2026, in Mumbai.
Investor presentation highlights include AUM growth targets of ₹1.5L Cr by FY28, stable asset quality, and AI-driven operational improvements.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance Ltd announces its participation in Jefferies' 2nd India NBFC Access Day on March 24, 2026, in Mumbai.
Investor presentation highlights include AUM growth targets of ₹1.5L Cr by FY28, stable asset quality, and AI-driven operational improvements.

news.title:
ICRA upgrades Piramal Finance's long-term rating to AA Stable, citing strong profiles.
Short-term rating reaffirmed at A1; no major outlook changes noted.
news.summary:
ICRA upgrades Piramal Finance's long-term rating to AA Stable, citing strong profiles.
Short-term rating reaffirmed at A1; no major outlook changes noted.

news.title:
Nomura forecasts AI-driven growth in NBFCs, boosting loan efficiency.
Stocks rated Buy include Piramal, LT Fin, Tata Capital by Nomura.
news.summary:
Nomura forecasts AI-driven growth in NBFCs, boosting loan efficiency.
Stocks rated Buy include Piramal, LT Fin, Tata Capital by Nomura.

news.title:
Piramal Finance plans analyst meetings on 18-19 Mar 2026 in Mumbai.
Targets 1.5L crore AUM by FY28; AI initiatives focus on efficiency.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance plans analyst meetings on 18-19 Mar 2026 in Mumbai.
Targets 1.5L crore AUM by FY28; AI initiatives focus on efficiency.

news.title:
Piramal Finance confirmed timely interest payments of Rs. 14,447.2 lakh for NCDs due on 11th March 2026.
Interest frequency remains annual; no changes reported. Payments adhere to SEBI compliance regulations.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance confirmed timely interest payments of Rs. 14,447.2 lakh for NCDs due on 11th March 2026.
Interest frequency remains annual; no changes reported. Payments adhere to SEBI compliance regulations.

news.title: Piramal Finance gains ₹148M from selling its subsidiary stake to Alliance Medical.
news.summary: Piramal Finance gains ₹148M from selling its subsidiary stake to Alliance Medical.

news.title:
Piramal Finance gets $148.1M from Imaging subsidiary sale, part of contingent payment.
Total potential payment capped at $200M; funds to strengthen balance sheet.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance gets $148.1M from Imaging subsidiary sale, part of contingent payment.
Total potential payment capped at $200M; funds to strengthen balance sheet.

news.title:
Piramal Finance and IIFL in early talks for an MFI deal.
IIFL Samasta's net worth is Rs 1,800Cr; deal value Rs 4,000-4,500Cr.
news.summary:
Piramal Finance and IIFL in early talks for an MFI deal.
